news.headline: Primo Water (NYSE: PRMW) approves a special dividend of 82 cents (811% increase from 9 cents), payable on Nov. 21, 2024.
news.summary: Primo Water (NYSE: PRMW) has approved a special dividend of 82 cents, marking an 811% increase from its previous quarterly dividend of 9 cents. Shareholders of record on Nov. 5, 2024, will receive the payment on Nov. 21, 2024. This decision follows the regulatory approval received under the Investment Canada Act for the merger of Primo Water and BlueTriton, Inc. The merger is anticipated to conclude by the end of 2024. By combining their brand and product portfolios, Primo Water aims to better satisfy customer needs and enhance service quality. PRMW is experiencing growth from its customer base and strategic investments, showcasing potential for continued value creation for shareholders.

news.headline: Motion Controls Robotics (MCRI) gets funding from Signature Bank NA to boost growth, acquire in Eastern U.S markets.
news.summary: FREMONT, Ohio - MCRI, a company based in Fremont, has recently obtained funding from Signature Bank NA to aid in its expansion efforts and pursue acquisitions in targeted Eastern U.S. regions. This financial assistance is intended to support MCRI's strategic growth plans and facilitate its entrance into key markets in the East.

news.headline: Sunwest Bank appoints Omar Morel as SVP, Director of Government Guaranteed Lending with 15+ years experience.

news.headline: New French-inspired restaurant, Grand Brasserie, opens in historic Grand Central Terminal's Vanderbilt Hall, bringing a timeless brasserie experience to New York City. Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Grand Brasserie, a new French-inspired culinary destination, has opened its doors in the historic Grand Central Terminal in New York City. Located in the iconic Vanderbilt Hall, this restaurant aims to offer a classic French brasserie experience to visitors. The debut of Grand Brasserie in this landmark location signals a nostalgic yet innovative addition to the city's food scene. The opening event, held on October 16, 2024, showcased the fusion of French culinary traditions with a modern twist. The restaurant boasts a seating capacity of xx patrons and features a menu highlighting traditional French dishes with a contemporary flair. By blending timeless elegance with a touch of sophistication, Grand Brasserie is poised to become a must-visit dining destination in New York City.

news.headline: Retired Microchip Technology CEO, Steve Sanghi, releases third book "Ask Steve" offering business advice.

The book delivers practical insights and guidance drawn from his esteemed leadership and business expertise.

news.headline: Quaint Oak Bancorp, Inc. declared $0.13 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on Nov 12, to shareholders on record on Oct 28.
news.summary: In Southampton, Pennsylvania, on October 16, 2024, Quaint Oak Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQB: QNTO) - the parent company of Quaint Oak Bank - disclosed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend amounting to $0.13 per share on the Company's common stock. The dividend will be distributed on November 12, 2024, to shareholders as of record on October 28, 2024.

news.headline: Red Sift partners with Pax8 to offer cyber solutions for MSPs; provides AI-driven services.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Red Sift has partnered with Pax8, a prominent cloud commerce marketplace. This collaboration will now allow Pax8 Marketplace to provide Red Sift's OnDMARC, Certificates, and Brand Trust services to its customers. Through Red Sift's innovative portfolio, users can access AI-powered tools for real-time automation in handling DMARC, certificate setup and fixing, and prevention of brand impersonations. By becoming a part of the Pax8 Marketplace, Red Sift aims to equip Managed Service Providers (MSPs) with advanced solutions.

news.headline: Samfine Creation Holdings Group Limited closed its IPO of 2,000,000 ordinary shares at $4.00 per share on Nasdaq with the symbol "SFHG" on October 15, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Hong Kong, Samfine Creation Holdings Group Limited (Nasdaq: SFHG), a company offering printing services, revealed the completion of its initial public offering. This offering consisted of 2,000,000 ordinary shares at a rate of $4.00 per share. The Ordinary Shares commenced trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market on October 15, 2024, bearing the symbol “SFHG.”

news.headline: Inszone Insurance Services merges with MG Insurance Services, enhancing contractor protection in Bay Area. MG founded in 1988.
news.summary: Inszone Insurance Services, a fast-growing national insurance provider, has acquired MG Insurance Services, a reputable agency specializing in personal lines and contractor insurance. MG Insurance Services, founded in May 1988 by Michael Gondoli, initially focused on non-standard auto insurance for clients with difficult driving records. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for Inszone Insurance Services as it expands its offerings. Founded over three decades ago, MG Insurance Services has a strong legacy in the industry, making this acquisition a strategic move.

news.headline: Banorte and UNHCR showcase financial inclusion efforts for refugees in Geneva. Introduced Enlace Digital to help refugees in Mexico.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Geneva, Switzerland, Banorte and the United Nations Refugee Agency (UNHCR) in Mexico showcased their groundbreaking project, Enlace Digital, to the UNHCR Executive Committee. This initiative aims to promote the financial integration of refugees within Mexico. This partnership highlights Banorte's commitment to fostering the inclusion of refugees in the financial system and facilitating their access to various banking services. The presentation emphasized the importance of leveraging digital tools to enhance financial inclusion for the refugee population in the country. The collaboration signifies a crucial step towards providing economic opportunities and promoting self-reliance for refugees residing in Mexico.

news.headline: 3rd Global Forum for Political Consultants and Campaign Managers took place in Washington, D.C., gathering industry leaders on October 15th at Bay Atlantic University.
news.summary: Yesterday, industry leaders convened at Bay Atlantic University in Washington, D.C., for the 3rd Global Forum for Political Consultants and Campaign Managers. The event, held on October 15th, gathered professionals in the field to discuss important issues. The forum took place in downtown Washington near the White House, showcasing the latest insights and trends in the industry.

news.headline: BNB Chain adopts Proposer-Builder Separation to address MEV, boosting security & efficiency in transactions. Learn more about MEV and protective steps.(digits)
news.summary: BNB Chain has implemented a new system called Proposer-Builder Separation to address challenges related to Miner Extractable Value (MEV). This update aims to improve security and efficiency in blockchain transactions by separating the roles of proposing and building a block. MEV refers to the additional profits that miners can make by reordering or censoring transactions in a block. This new system helps to mitigate the risks associated with MEV, ensuring a more secure and fair environment for users. By enhancing transaction security and efficiency, BNB Chain's Proposer-Builder Separation is a significant step towards safeguarding blockchain transactions. To find out more about MEV, its impacts, and the protective measures taken, read on.

Bassam Aoun is one of the key individuals joining the company as part of this initiative. The company's decision is a strategic move that highlights their dedication to improving revenue strategies and expanding their market presence. news.headline: Gene Tracy, America's Strongest Firefighter, launches Performance Protein+ for NBPure. Unique blend with time-release formula.
news.summary: In Phoenix on October 16, 2024, Gene Tracy, a firefighter from Glendale, Arizona, who was named America's Strongest Firefighter in 2019 and won the U.S. Police & Fire Gold Medal in 2022, has developed a specialized protein mix known as Performance Protein+ for the top supplement firm NBPure. Each scoop of this blend features a unique formula designed to enhance physical performance and recovery for individuals engaged in intense training regimes.

news.headline: Chef Adrianne Calvo partners with Channing Crowder to open new location Cracked by Chef Adrianne at Hard Rock Stadium.
news.summary: Miami's renowned chef Adrianne Calvo's popular dining spot, Cracked by Chef Adrianne, is expanding to a new venue in South Florida. This new location, set to open at a premier sports and entertainment facility, marks an exciting development for the culinary destination. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024, revealing the partnership between Chef Adrianne Calvo and a former Miami figure. The expansion is expected to bring Calvo's acclaimed concept to a larger audience, with hopes of continued success.

news.headline: KeyCorp's Q3 earnings expect 15 cents/share (down from 29 cents last year) and $1.27 billion revenue (down from $1.56 billion). Stock's annual dividend yield is 4.62% ($0.205/share quarterly).  Total characters: 202
news.summary: On Thursday, October 17, KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) is scheduled to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens. Analysts are predicting that the Cleveland-based company will report earnings of 15 cents per share for the quarter, a decrease from the 29 cents per share reported in the same period last year. KeyCorp is expected to reveal revenue of $1.27 billion for the recent quarter, down from $1.56 billion in the previous year.Following this forecast, Baird analyst David George has downgraded KeyCorp from Outperform to Neutral and adjusted the price target from $18 to $17. Despite this, investors are considering the company's dividend potential, with an annual dividend yield of 4.62%, translating to a quarterly dividend of 20.5 cents per share or 82 cents per year. Investors are watching closely for any developments in this area.For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tusk Ventures CEO criticizes SEC Chair Gensler for unclear crypto regulations, calling him "worst regulator ever."
news.summary: Tusk Ventures CEO Bradley Tusk has publicly criticized SEC Chair Gary Gensler's management of cryptocurrency regulations. In a recent CNBC interview, Tusk expressed his discontent with Gensler's regulatory approach, citing the lack of clarity in defining legality within the crypto industry. Tusk believes this uncertainty stifles innovation and has even gone to the extent of labeling Gensler as the “worst crypto regulator” to date. He also commented on the ongoing discord between the CFTC and SEC regarding crypto regulation. This story is available in detail on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) declares $1.16 per share, payable Dec. 6, 2024, to shareholders of record as of Nov. 18.
news.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.16 per common share. Shareholders as of Nov. 18, 2024, will receive the dividend on Dec. 6, 2024. L3Harris Technologies is a leading company in the defense industry, providing technology solutions for space, air, land, and sea operations as the Trusted Disruptor. Their focus on meeting mission-critical needs sets them apart in delivering innovative solutions.

news.headline: 3Si and Rapid Response partner to improve crime response and officer safety, setting new standards in verified real-time intelligence.
news.summary: In MALVERN, Pa. & SYRACUSE, N.Y., 3Si and Rapid Response Monitoring have revealed a strategic partnership aimed at revolutionizing crime response and law enforcement support. This collaboration will establish a groundbreaking model for verified real-time crime intelligence and officer safety during felony-level incidents. By prioritizing the safeguarding of communities and the empowerment of law enforcement, this partnership is poised to improve the verification, reporting, and response to ongoing felony cases.

news.headline: ABB's Stuart Thompson wins Stand Out 50 award from Future of Field Service for 2024.
news.summary: Stuart Thompson, the President of ABB Electrification Service, has been recognized as one of the Stand Out 50 Award recipients by Future of Field Service. This prestigious award highlights individuals who have made significant contributions to the field service industry. news.headline: QualRecruit report highlights Harris' weaker economy support despite polling, based on Swing State voters' opinions.
news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, QualRecruit, a leading consumer study recruitment provider, unveiled a study on factors influencing economic trust in the upcoming 2024 election. The research focused on Swing State voters' perceptions of the US economy under the candidate they trust most on economic matters and the rival candidate. The study delved into how voters envision the economic future under the leadership of the candidate they have more faith in regarding economic issues. Specifically, the study examined respondents who favored Donald Trump over economic policies and those who leaned towards Kamala Harris in economic matters.

Since 2023, they have granted over 50 franchises nationwide, showcasing rapid expansion. This success has enabled them to strengthen their network for handling substantial projects.

news.headline: New documentary "Fight Like Hell" exposes truths of Jan 6 Capitol attack, released globally on YouTube Oct 16, 2024.

This documentary aims to provide insight into the circumstances surrounding the Capitol attack, offering crucial information to viewers.

news.headline: Enerpac Tool Group corrects free cash flow guidance to $85-95 million for FY 2025, adjusting from $89-99 million.
news.summary: In a recent statement by Enerpac Tool Group Corp. (NYSE: EPAC), it has been corrected that the forecasted adjusted EBITDA is $150 million to $160 million, with an expected free cash flow of $85 million to $95 million. This adjustment replaces the previously stated free cash flow range of $89 million to $99 million in the Outlook section. The $85 million to $95 million free cash flow estimate aligns with the initial financial tables provided in the release and the materials shared during the earnings call conducted recently.

news.headline: LAZ Charitable Foundation aids 75+ non-profits in first LAZ Day of Giving, expanding global impact under new leadership.
news.summary: Ralph Caldin, the newly appointed Executive Director, has successfully steered the foundation in Hartford, Conn., as of Oct. 16, 2024. Under his leadership, the organization has significantly increased awareness of its philanthropic initiatives and has managed to expand its donor network, consequently increasing its global reach. The foundation's efforts have garnered support from individuals and organizations worldwide, taking their impact to new heights. Alan Lazowski, the Chairman and CEO of LAZ Parking, expresses his satisfaction with the foundation's progress under Caldin's guidance.

news.headline: Single entity behind $26M bet on Trump winning election on Polymarket. Analysis shows coordinated activity among four accounts.
news.summary: An updated report indicates a potential single entity behind a significant $26 million wager on Donald Trump winning the election via the Polymarket platform. Analysis reveals four accounts - Fredi9999, PrincessCaro, Michie, and Theo4 - displaying similar betting patterns, indicating possible coordinated activity. A user named Fozzy Diablo highlights the lack of overlap in the accounts, suggesting they are controlled by the same entity. Deposits into these accounts, all sourced from Kraken, consist of consistent amounts of $500,000 or $1 million each. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nonprofit honors 2024 Pro Bono Awardees fighting for veterans;  #vetsprobono helping those who fought for us.
news.summary: In 2024, a group of awardees dedicated to pro bono work is making strides to support veterans through legal services. The Veterans Consortium Pro Bono Program, known for their commitment to assisting veterans, is a prominent national nonprofit organization. Established in Washington, the program aims to offer free legal aid to veterans in need. Their efforts have garnered attention with the use of hashtags such as #theyfoughtforus and #veteranslegalservices. This initiative highlights the importance of supporting those who have served our country, with a focus on delivering vital legal assistance.

news.headline: Natus introduces FDA cleared Grass MR Conditional/CT Cup Electrodes with 28% longer lead lengths for easier application.

These electrodes showcase lead lengths that are 28% longer, aimed at facilitating easier application. These electrodes are verified to be safe in both 1.5T and 3T MR environments, marking them as the lengthiest to receive such certification.

news.headline: Russell 2000 close to key breakout at 2,300 points as small caps aim to outperform S&P 500. 6.7% below peak. Market watching closely for rally.
news.summary: The Russell 2000 Index is close to breaking out to levels seen last in November 2021, testing a crucial resistance at 2,300 points last reached on July 31. While other major indices like the S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Nasdaq 100 have hit new highs in 2024, the Russell 2000 is still 6.7% below its peak. Investors are watching if small-cap stocks can catch up to large-cap stocks due to economic growth and lower interest rates. Small caps are more sensitive to economic conditions and interest rates. This news is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Moderna stock drops after issuing light 2025 sales outlook, cuts 2027 R&D budget. Is MRNA stock a sell?
news.summary: Moderna's stock experienced a significant decline following the announcement of a modest sales projection for 2025 and a reduction in the 2027 R&D budget. This has prompted questions about whether MRNA stock should be sold.

news.headline: Rocket Lab stock soared above buy point on NASA win, but beware of risks like rival SpaceX.
news.summary: Shares of Rocket Lab surged beyond a significant purchase threshold following a successful bid for a NASA contract. However, it faces competition from SpaceX, a major risk factor. Keep an eye on this developing situation as Rocket Lab's stock continues to rise.
